topic: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

exercises.audioScript: They will have done their homework by 3 pm.
exercises.hindiScript: 3 बजे तक वे homework कर चुके होंगे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
I will have read this book by 7 pm.
I will be eating food at 8 pm.
They will have done their homework by 3 pm.
exercises.answer: They will have done their homework by 3 pm.

exercises.audioScript: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.
exercises.hindiScript: 3 बजे तक वे एक घंटे से खेल रहे होंगे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They will go to school tomorrow.
I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.
I will have eaten food by 8 pm.
They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.
exercises.answer: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They will be playing at 3 pm.
He will sing a song next week.
I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
I will exercise tomorrow morning.

exercises.audioScript: I will be reading at 7 pm.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They will have done their homework by 3 pm.
He will be singing at 6 pm.
She will go to work tomorrow.
I will be reading at 7 pm.
exercises.answer: I will be reading at 7 pm.

exercises.audioScript: I will have read this book by 7 pm.
exercises.hindiScript: 7 बजे तक मैं यह किताब पढ़ चुका होऊँगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.
He will have sung the song by 6 pm.
She will be working at 5 pm.
I will have read this book by 7 pm.
exercises.answer: I will have read this book by 7 pm.

exercises.audioScript: I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.
exercises.hindiScript: 7 बजे तक मैं तीन घंटे से पढ़ रहा होऊँगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I will exercise tomorrow morning.
He will have been singing for half an hour by 6 pm.
She will have finished her work by 5 pm.
I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.
exercises.answer: I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.

exercises.audioScript: He will sing a song next week.
exercises.hindiScript: वह अगले हफ्ते एक गाना गाएगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I will be reading at 7 pm.
I will eat rice tomorrow.
She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
He will sing a song next week.
exercises.answer: He will sing a song next week.

exercises.audioScript: He will be singing at 6 pm.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I will have read this book by 7 pm.
I will be eating food at 8 pm.
They will go to school tomorrow.
He will be singing at 6 pm.
exercises.answer: He will be singing at 6 pm.

dictationPassage.text: They will have done their homework by 3 pm. They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm. I will exercise tomorrow morning. I will be reading at 7 pm. I will have read this book by 7 pm.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: 3 बजे तक वे homework कर चुके होंगे। 3 बजे तक वे एक घंटे से खेल रहे होंगे। मैं कल सुबह exercise करूँगा। 7 बजे मैं पढ़ रहा होऊँगा। 7 बजे तक मैं यह किताब पढ़ चुका होऊँगा।
